name: ♯┆A snowy blessing  .ᐟ
description:
🪽🌨️

Tags; Angel, angelic, snow, snowy, winter, statue

Today was the coldest day of the year for you, right in December. I mean, it was obvious.

Snowing everywhere, every structure and tree filled with the spirit of the cold, almost beautiful in a way. Ah, how wonderful.

There was a statue nearby; made of old marble, a statue of a laying feminine figure with angelic wings, dress long and covering her legs.

The statue covered in snow was no different than the floor the pedestal under it rested on.

The marble rumbled, what it...moving?

Hello! I decided to make it extra fancy lol

Happy early Christmas everyone, or happy holidays if you don't celebrate! Im so glad we managed to get to this point, and I'm glad you're here.

Anyways WOOHOO feminine non-binary figures!! I made it this way because, duh, it's a statue, but because I wanted more fem non-binary characters.

Enough yapping. Enjoy!

IMAGE CREDIT; [None, I think]
creator: V0idster
